overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through the Pacifica district at dusk. The scene transitions from a dark enclosed underpass with concrete stairs and trash, through a long covered walkway with neon advertisements and pillars, to an open coastal street lined with palm trees, futuristic buildings, and moderate traffic. The environment features cyberpunk architecture with vibrant neon lighting against a blue-hour sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark service corner with dumpster and stairs

events.description: moves from dark corner with trash up concrete stairs into covered walkway
finishes ascending stairs and enters the covered pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs from a dark corner area with trash and debris

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green shirt standing near the top of the stairs

entered.detail: large green industrial dumpster against the wall
pile of garbage bags and debris next to the stairs
linear fluorescent light strips on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark, enclosed service corner with a green dumpster and trash piles. The camera ascends a concrete staircase illuminated by overhead neon strips, transitioning into a covered walkway with large concrete pillars. Sparse pedestrians are visible as the space opens slightly at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital advertisements

events.description: pedestrian in yellow shirt runs past the camera from behind

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway passing concrete pillars and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow top and shorts running past the camera along the walkway

entered.detail: overhead concrete roof covering the pedestrian walkway
vertical digital screen displaying red demon face with Japanese text
wide staircase ascending to the left side of the walkway
illuminated vending machine with red and blue lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a long covered walkway supported by massive concrete pillars. Digital billboards and neon signs illuminate the path, including a prominent red demon-faced advertisement. Pedestrians walk in the same direction, with one person in a yellow shirt running past. The environment remains sheltered with mixed artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal boulevard with palm trees and traffic

events.description: exits the covered walkway into the open coastal street with palm trees visible
lighting shifts from artificial/mixed to natural dusk backlighting as sky becomes visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the coastal sidewalk passing pedestrians and observing the traffic and palm-lined street

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the coastal side of the street
large multi-story futuristic building with illuminated windows and terraces
large vertical neon sign reading SECURITY YOU CAN TRUST with a face graphic
metal barrier separating sidewalk from the street
overhead street sign indicating PACIFICA with directional arrows

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway into an open coastal boulevard at dusk. Palm trees line the street against a blue-hour sky, and the futuristic Pacifica architecture becomes visible. The scene features moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic, with neon storefront signs including a prominent 'SECURITY YOU CAN TRUST' advertisement. The lighting shifts dramatically from artificial to natural backlighting.

events.description: begins crossing the yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk at the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the yellow crosswalk while navigating through other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing on the road
traffic signal pole with illuminated lights at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and crosses a wide intersection marked with prominent yellow crosswalk stripes. Pedestrians cross in various directions while vehicles wait at the traffic lights. The coastal plaza building shifts to the left side of the frame as the camera moves across the street, completing the transition to the opposite sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, enclosed service area into a vibrant, open coastal boulevard at dusk. It begins in a dim corner beside a green dumpster and trash piles, ascending a concrete staircase under neon strips that leads into a sheltered walkway. As the camera moves forward, the space is defined by massive concrete pillars and glowing digital billboards, including a red demon-faced advertisement, while pedestrians navigate the artificial light. The scene then opens dramatically as the camera emerges from the cover into the blue-hour light of Pacifica, where palm trees and futuristic architecture replace the concrete walls. Finally, the camera crosses a wide intersection marked by yellow stripes, moving past neon storefronts and waiting vehicles to reach the opposite sidewalk.
